query:
-- Distribuição de jogos por fase
SELECT phase, status, COUNT(*) AS total FROM games WHERE tournamentId = 60001 GROUP BY phase, status ORDER BY phase;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2wStqi96Bwp1QsN.a3b8e3def1a1 --database dJv8mGehu4r2vn8N2SWpLW --execute -- Distribuição de jogos por fase
SELECT phase, status, COUNT(*) AS total FROM games WHERE tournamentId = 60001 GROUP BY phase, status ORDER BY phase;
